summary: Open-side joint web-producers integration: vendor producers-clean R1-R5, adapter-route the producer surface, gate (web_parity + suites + live probes), attempt deletion of the four producer files and the dispatch shells

result.gate:
All work complete, gated, no commits, no stray servers. Here is my summary.

---

# PRODUCERS cluster integration â€” open-side, 2026-07-18

## What routed
- **R1 `main/help`** now serves entirely through the clean `producers::render_help_pane` (via `handlers/producers_adapt.rs::help_pane` + `handlers/mod.rs::json_str_response`, dispatched in `theory.rs::theory_path_main`). **Byte-identical**, proven three ways: (a) the ported `HELP_STATIC` (2154 B) `diff`-identical to the vendored `help_static.html`; (b) the clean skin primitives coincide with the ported dispatch's (`postprocess_lines`==`postprocess_html` on the join pattern, `escape_text`==the 5-entity escape, `html_envelope`==serde `json_resp::html` same escaping + html-first key order); (c) new guard `tests/producers_help_parity.rs` asserts the full envelope byte-equals the reconstructed ported one (incl. metachars + banner), and the real-server capture test `routes_basic::test_main_help_envelope_matches_haskell_keys` passes on the routed response. Blast radius is provably one call site.

## What was vendored (step 1)
- `producers-clean/src/` â†’ `crates/tamarin-server/src/producers/` (8 `.rs` + 7 `.html`), mechanical `crate::`â†’`super::` + `lib.rs`â†’`mod.rs` only. Reverse transform byte-identical to source; HTML byte-identical. Headerless, citation-free (no `.hs`/`Ported from`/module paths) â†’ `gen_license_headers.py` adds no header (provenance tripwire clear). `pub mod producers;` added to `lib.rs`. Builds + full `tamarin-server` suite green before routing.

## What was deleted (step 3)
- **NONE.** All four target files interleave clean-replaceable producer content with irreducible core:
  - `proof_tree.rs` â€” **defines `ProofState`**, the server-wide proof-state type (used by state.rs/theory.rs/theory_io.rs/theory_html.rs); ~90 % is solver machinery.
  - `theory_html.rs` â€” `sources_html`/`compute_source_lists`/`source_case_counts` (saturation+refinement), `proof_html`â†’`render_sub_proof_snippet` (applicable methods), injective-fact + intruder-rule classification â€” all solver.
  - `root.rs` â€” live axum plumbing `postRootR` upload / `kill_thread` / `robots` / `favicon` (`Web/Handler.hs`), not producer content.
  - `path_parse.rs` â€” clean R5 deliberately omits the `Method` grammar (drives proof-method application), the Yesod `prefixWithUnderscore` quirk, `url_path_escape`/`encode_sub_path`, and uses a Haskell-`reads` numeric grammar vs the port's strict `.parse::<usize>()`.
  - Extraction relocates the header (round-9 finding); moving to clean code is a forbidden provenance violation.

## What was kept-and-reported (blockers)
- **R1 message/rules/tactic**: frame proven byte-identical, but bodies need inline solver data-gathering; and the clean R1 API returns the full `{html,title}` envelope while `overview`'s shell needs the inner fragment â€” no clean inner-only entry point exists, so routing them (or help's `overview`/`reload` embeddings) would transplant the frame. Kept.
- **R2 west pane / R3 proof-tree**: map to `render_proof_script`/`render_proof_tree` but need the live `ProofNode` tree + per-node method/formula text extracted; `proof_tree.rs` stays as `ProofState` home. Zero-header, hot-path risk â†’ kept.
- **R4 welcome**: producers omits the empty "No theories loaded!" index and diverges on HS-quirk bytes; root.rs plumbing stays regardless. Kept.
- **R5 grammar**: unmodeled `Method` + underscore quirk + numeric grammar (above). Kept.
- **Dispatch shells (step 4)**: re-confirmed blocked â€” `proof-step`/`graph-svg`/`unload` have no clean home; per topology below, deleting shells drops zero citations.

## Gate numbers (step 6)
- `cargo build --release` â€” 0 errors. `cargo test --workspace` â€” **all green** (tamarin-server lib 109+2ign + routes 6/19/4/3/3/15/3 + producers_help_parity 2; theory 495+oracle 19+wf 5; parser 67+2; prover 60+cli 7+split 55).
- `wf_gate.sh` (full 419-corpus) â€” **MATCH=419 DIFF=0**, byte-identical to `wf_gate_round7.tsv`.
- `pretty_gate.sh` â€” **MATCH=403 DIFF=16**, byte-identical to the `pretty_gate_r1` 403/16 baseline (the 16 are the known pre-existing DIFFs).
- `web_parity.sh` (16-file allowlist, RS release vs HS cache, 16/16) â€” **7765 MATCH / 319 DIFF**; **`main/help` MATCH on all 16**; every DIFF is a pre-existing `main/proof`/`main/cases` SOLVER pane (zero outside solver panes, blast-radius-proven unrelated).
- `gen_license_headers.py --check` â€” **0 stale, 133 headers (delta 0)**; producers + adapters headerless, no clean file acquired a header
